emails.subject: Re: Du-licate?
emails.body: Re: Du-licate? I guess EVERYONE is going at a mad pace today, because we just checked with the Amerex broker, who said he's in the process of putting that second deal in meanwhile his back office is trying to check out! What the...? So Amerex should see the second deal, identical to the first, any second. Let me know if they still don't check out. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/08/2000 12:28 PM

emails.subject: Du-licate?
emails.body: Du-licate? Amerex shows this deal once and Mike Swerzbin shows it twice ref 477089 and 477088. Can you check with Mike and see if this is a duplicate of not. trade date 12-8-00 Sell Bonneville Power Administration $700 MID COLUMBIA 1/1/01 1/31/01 25mw onpeak .0075 fee
